title: JointWise: A Knee Tear Detection Platform
description: Developed a YOLOv11 stacking ensemble for MRI injury detection that achieved 75.17% mAP, 88% FROC, and 73.50% F1 score. Engineered an end-to-end AI system comprising a Next.js web application, secure API middleware, Appwrite database and storage services, and a containerized inference server running in a Linux environment. Deployed to Azure Kubernetes Service with logging, monitoring, and alerting. Co-authored a paper selected as one of the Top 10 concept papers under the DOST-PCHRD-funded MAGNUS H-Hub and presented in the Computer Science category at IRCITE 2026.
achievements: YOLOv11 ensemble: 75.17% mAP, 88% FROC, 73.50% F1 score
End-to-end Next.js + Appwrite + Linux inference in ~3 seconds
Top 10 concept paper, DOST-PCHRD MAGNUS H-Hub

title: BantayBayan: An Intelligent Survival Beacon
description: Built a dual Random Forest regression ensemble predicting flood probability and depth over a ~1 km grid across Pampanga, trained on Google Earth Engine flood-frequency data with 6 geospatial features. Deployed Edge AI to Flutter by converting models through ONNX to TensorFlow Lite for fully offline inference. Built multi-source data pipeline and Google Gemini-powered advisory generating hyper-localized storm-preparation checklists.
achievements: Dual Random Forest ensemble for flood probability and depth prediction
ONNX to TensorFlow Lite for fully offline Flutter inference
Google Earth Engine geospatial pipeline with 6-feature dataset

title: Large-Scale Digital Twins & Autonomous Robotic Simulations
description: Developing large-scale digital twins and autonomous robotic simulations to enhance operational efficiency. Creating bespoke generative AI frameworks that merge theoretical research with practical applications. Orchestrating the integration of spatial computing and advanced AI models for high-fidelity simulations.
achievements: Created custom generative AI frameworks combining theory with practice
Integrated spatial computing with advanced AI models
